finding_results.notes: Replaced the chapter-number meta line with an in-world bridge anchored in Nami's perception of Halcote's imminent sleepwalker threat and family denial.

summary: Revised the chapter-end Halcote handoff to eliminate process leakage and keep the forward pull grounded in Nami's in-world dread of the spreading sleepwalker damage.
